DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILLED BY THE PLAINTIFF;

CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, VALERIE BIRKNER, REGINA COWAN, MARTHA CURRY, JULIE HUEY, ILLA FAYE KOHAN, SILVIA LESSING, JILL RIFKIN, LAURA ROBERTS, FAYE SCANLON, NYRI THOMSON, CHRISSY WONG, MARIAN AS TO DEFENDANT WOLF CAMERIA ,INC A FOREIGN CORP DBA WOLF CAMERA ONE THROUGH TEN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-11-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-06-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-13-2002

RESPONSE TO THE OSC RE OBTAINING AN ANSWER FROM OR ENTERING A DEFAULT AGAINST DEFTS ISSUED BY THE PRE-TRIAL DEPT ON SEPT 26,2002 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, VALERIE BIRKNER, REGINA COWAN, MARTHA CURRY, JULIE HUEY, ILLA FAYE KOHAN, SILVIA LESSING, JILL RIFKIN, LAURA ROBERTS, FAYE SCANLON, NYRI THOMSON, CHRISSY WONG, MARIAN
CORRESPONDENCE, PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, TED OMHOLT TO LORI J. BIEN; IN RE: JUDICIAL ARBITRATION

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT RITZ CAMERA CENTERS, INC. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE (#408818 AND #402080): NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY). (302/AJR/JU) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-13-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR PER COURT ORDER CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NUMBER 402080. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-13-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-11-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
